scripts.setup: uv sync --project backend && npm --prefix web install
scripts.api: uv run --project backend uvicorn app.main:app --app-dir backend --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000 --reload
scripts.desktop: npm run build && cd backend && uv run --extra desktop python -m app.desktop
scripts.desktop:smoke: npm run build && cd backend && uv run --extra desktop python -m app.desktop --smoke-test
scripts.test:web: npm --prefix web run lint && npm --prefix web run test -- --run && npm --prefix web run build
scripts.test: npm run test:api && npm run test:web
